task_text: Draft a status update email to Meridian Group summarizing where Project Helios stands this week. Tone should be professional and reassuring. Save the draft as meridian_status_email_draft.txt.

input.content:
Subject: Project Helios Weekly Status Update

Dear Meridian Group Team,

I hope you are doing well. I’m writing to share this week’s status update for Project Helios.

Overall, the project remains on track, with steady progress across the current workstreams. The team has continued to advance the key deliverables planned for this phase, and there are no critical blockers to report at this time.

This week’s highlights include:

- Continued progress on core project milestones, with priority tasks moving forward as expected.
- Ongoing coordination across internal teams to ensure dependencies are being managed proactively.
- Review and refinement of current deliverables to maintain quality and alignment with project objectives.
- Active monitoring of timeline, scope, and risk areas to ensure any emerging issues are addressed early.

Looking ahead, the team will remain focused on completing the next set of planned activities, validating deliverables, and maintaining clear communication around any decisions or inputs needed from stakeholders.

We appreciate Meridian Group’s continued partnership and engagement. At this stage, we remain confident in the project’s direction and will continue to keep you closely informed as work progresses.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
